text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
73 
GAP_DAYS_INP_3M 
LABEL: 
Gap Standard Retail — Number of Days in Three-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a three-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using 
an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the coverage gap 
phase of the Part D benefit. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS
